name: Miglior Canned Dog Food - Beef Chunks - 405g
description: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 30% (beef 5%), cereals, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 75%, Crude protein 8,0%, Crude fat 4,5%, Crude fibres 0,5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives /kg : Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper(II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days.
